# CANDIDATE: overnight_grinder_top_parameter_combo

**Filed:** 2026-05-31
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** Parameter optimization — v14/v15 exit structure tuning
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-OOS)

## Hypothesis

Tighter stop losses on LEVEL and TRENDLINE setups combined with relaxed TP1 targets (super_tp1=1.0, runner_target=3.0) improve edge capture on J's source-of-truth winner days while avoiding loser days.

## Mechanism

| Parameter | Baseline | Keeper | Delta |
|---|---|---|---|
| super_stop | -0.20 | -0.20 | 0 |
| super_tp1 | 0.75 | 1.0 | +33% |
| runner_target | ~2.0 | 3.0 | +50% |
| level_stop | -0.14 | -0.10 | -29% (tighter) |
| level_tp1 | 0.40 | 0.30 | -25% |
| trendline_stop | -0.08 | -0.06 | -25% (tighter) |
| level_qty | N/A | 18 | new |

## Expected impact on OP-16 anchors

| J day | Current engine behavior | Proposed behavior | Delta |
|---|---|---|---|
| 4/29 winner | +$342 (baseline) | +$306.30 (est) | -$35.70 |
| 5/01 winner | +$470 (baseline) | -$16.17 (est) | -$486.17 |
| 5/04 winner | +$730 (baseline) | +$804.72 (est) | +$74.72 |
| 5/05 loser | -$260 (baseline) | $0.00 (skipped) | +$260.00 |
| 5/06 loser | -$300 (baseline) | $0.00 (skipped) | +$300.00 |
| 5/07 loser 1 | -$45 (baseline) | +$74.29 (wrong direction) | +$119.29 |
| 5/07 loser 2 | -$120 (baseline) | +$74.29 (wrong direction) | +$194.29 |

**Edge capture:** $1,111.02 > $771 threshold (PASS)

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** level_qty=18 requires $25K+ account; $1K paper realizes ~$140 of $1,005 headline P&L
2. **Sample bias:** 432 combos tested on single 16-month window; 5 keepers; top selected — overfit risk moderate to high
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS — no walk-forward validation performed
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS — BS sim only, no OPRA validation
5. **Failure modes:** 
   - 5/01 winner missed (-$16.17) — engine failed to capture J's entry
   - 5/07 shows +$74.29 on J's loser days — wrong directional bias introduced
   - Low WR (16.1%) indicates high variance, most days lose
6. **Concentration:** top5_pct=13.23% — acceptable

## Pre-merge gate

- [ ] Walk-forward validation (IS 2025-01..2025-09, OOS 2025-10..2026-05)
- [ ] OOS edge_capture ≥ $771
- [ ] Real-fills check on top-3 J days (4/29, 5/01, 5/04)
- [ ] Investigate 5/07 directional conflict
- [ ] Investigate 5/01 miss

## Confidence

3/10 — Multiple red flags: no OOS, 5/07 wrong direction, 5/01 miss, low WR

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

Does not conflict with existing candidates. This is a parameter optimization on existing v14/v15 structure, not a new trade class. Complementary to #12 (V14E_PARAM_SWEEP_26K) which tested different parameter ranges.
